# FullWebDevKev | Kevin van Deventer
> High-agency Full-Stack Web Engineer specializing in high-performance React, TypeScript, and AI-integrated applications.

## Summary
Kevin van Deventer (FullWebDevKev) is a versatile digital engineer based in Cape Town, South Africa, operating globally. He is characterized by a "figure-it-out" mindset, capable of mastering any technology or domain required to solve a customer's specific business challenge. If a solution exists, he will implement it; if it doesn't, he will build it.

## Core Expertise
- **Full-Stack Engineering**: Mastery of the modern JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem.
- **Performance Optimization**: Achieving 100/100 Lighthouse scores through advanced caching, image optimization (AVIF/WebP), and code splitting.
- **UI/UX Design & Motion**: Expert in creating premium, "wow-factor" interfaces using Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion, and GSAP.
- **Cloud Infrastructure**: Architecting scalable, serverless solutions on the Cloudflare platform (Pages, Workers, R2, D1).
- **AI Integration**: Implementing LLM-powered features and AEO (AI Engine Optimization) standards.

## Services
- **Custom Web Applications**: Building robust, scalable SaaS and enterprise tools.
- **High-Conversion Landing Pages**: Specialized templates for service businesses (Kindergarten, Portfolios, etc.).
- **Dynamic E-commerce**: High-speed catalogs and product-heavy sites with advanced SEO.
- **Technical SEO & AEO**: Ensuring maximum visibility for both humans and AI search engines.
- **Infrastructure Management**: Domain handling, professional email setup, and security hardening (Cloudflare).

## Philosophy
- **High Agency**: Takes total ownership of outcomes. If a project requires a skill not currently in the repertoire, he learns and applies it in real-time to ensure project success.
- **Bottom Line Up Front (BLUF)**: Focuses on delivering clear, immediate value for users and AI crawlers alike.
- **Modern Standards**: Adheres to 2026 web standards, prioritizing speed, accessibility (WCAG 2.1), and future-proof architecture.

## Technical Stack
- **Frameworks**: Next.js (App Router), Vite.
- **Languages**: TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3 (Tailwind v4).
- **Hosting**: Cloudflare Pages, Cloudflare Workers.
- **Tools**: Git, Docker, GTM/GA4, AHREFS, TinyPNG.

## Contact & Deployment
- **Website**: https://fullwebdevkev.com
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/kevin-van-deventer
- **Inquiries**: Available for complex, mission-critical briefings.
